## Checklist

- [ ] `terraform fmt` executed
- [ ] `terraform validate` passes without errors
- [ ] `terraform plan` reviewed and approved
- [ ] Sensitive variables passed via GitHub secrets (not in plain text)
- [ ] Tags `managed_by = "terraform"` present on all resources
